context7.name: Context7
context7.description: Library/framework docs lookup. Prevents API hallucination by fetching current documentation for React, Next.js, Django, etc.

playwright.name: Playwright
playwright.description: Browser automation via accessibility tree (not screenshots). Cross-browser testing, scraping JS-heavy pages, visual verification.

figma.name: Figma
figma.description: Bidirectional design-to-code. Read components/variables/layout from Figma, write back to canvas. Code Connect keeps generated code aligned.

sentry.name: Sentry
sentry.description: Error tracking. Pull stack traces, error events, frequency data. Workflow: paste issue ID -> agent reads trace -> writes fix -> opens PR.

supabase.name: Supabase
supabase.description: Database schema exploration, SQL execution, TypeScript type generation, database branching. Official Claude connector.

cloudflare.name: Cloudflare (Code Mode)
cloudflare.description: 2,500+ Cloudflare endpoints with 99.9% token reduction via Code Mode. Workers, KV, D1, R2 management.

stripe.name: Stripe
stripe.description: Stripe API documentation search + payment integration helpers. OAuth + restricted keys for security.

linear.name: Linear
linear.description: Issue tracking integration. Manage issues, sprints, projects from within the agent. Saves context-switching.

_harness_builtin_reference._description: These are NOT standalone MCP servers — they are built into omo/omx harnesses. Listed here as reference for what harness-level search/intelligence tools exist.

omo-grep.name: omo grep (built-in)
omo-grep.description: ripgrep binary auto-downloaded per OS. Structural search behind grep/rg backend selection. Not a standalone MCP — built into oh-my-openagent.

omo-ast-grep.name: omo ast-grep (built-in MCP)
omo-ast-grep.description: AST-level structural search/replace via @ast-grep/napi. Metavariable patterns ($NAME, $$$ARGS). Falls back to npx @ast-grep/cli.

omo-lsp.name: omo LSP (built-in MCP)
omo-lsp.description: Language server protocol via vscode-jsonrpc. Diagnostics, symbols, hover, references. Powers code intelligence without IDE.

omo-grep-app.name: grep.app (omo default remote)
omo-grep-app.description: Global public code search across GitHub repos. Useful for finding implementation examples. Remote HTTP MCP at https://mcp.grep.app.

omx-code-intel.name: omx code-intel (built-in MCP)
omx-code-intel.description: 9 tools: LSP diagnostics (tsc wrapper), document/workspace symbols, hover, find references (grep -rn -w), ast_grep search/replace. Pragmatic CLI wrappers, not full LSP.

omx-state.name: omx state (built-in MCP)
omx-state.description: Mode/workflow state management for omx harness.

_note: Only genuinely useful MCP servers in 'servers'. '_harness_builtin_reference' documents what omo/omx harnesses provide natively — not installable via this registry, but referenced for architecture comparison.
